name: A2 Hosting
tagline: Fastest shared hosting with turbo servers
description: A2 Hosting offers the fastest shared hosting with its Turbo servers, delivering up to 20x faster page loads for performance-critical websites.
longDescription: A2 Hosting differentiates itself with a relentless focus on speed. The Turbo plan uses NVMe SSD storage, LiteSpeed web server, and advanced caching to deliver page loads up to 20x faster than standard shared hosting. In our speed tests, A2 Hosting's Turbo plan averaged 0.8-second page loads — the fastest shared hosting we tested. The developer-friendly environment includes support for multiple PHP versions, Node.js, Python, and Git integration. While the Turbo plans cost more than basic shared hosting, the performance improvement is tangible. The main drawback is an outdated client area and less polished onboarding compared to competitors.
pros: NVMe SSD storage on all plans
cons: No free domain on basic plans

keyFeatures.name: Turbo Servers
keyFeatures.description: NVMe SSD storage with LiteSpeed web server and advanced caching. Delivers up to 20x faster page loads than standard shared hosting configurations.

keyFeatures.name: Developer Tools
keyFeatures.description: Full support for Node.js, Python, Ruby, PHP (multiple versions), Git, and SSH access. Ideal for developers who need flexibility.

keyFeatures.name: Perpetual Security
keyFeatures.description: Free HackScan protection, dual firewall, brute force defense, and virus scanning. Proactive security monitoring included free on all plans.

keyFeatures.name: Anytime Money-Back
keyFeatures.description: Prorated refund if you cancel after 30 days. Unlike competitors who only refund within 30 days, A2 Hosting offers refunds for unused service at any time.

verdict: A2 Hosting is the best choice for users who prioritize speed above all else. The Turbo plans deliver genuinely faster performance than standard shared hosting, making them ideal for e-commerce and content-heavy sites. The developer tools are a bonus for technical users. Budget users should stick with basic plans or consider Hostinger.

faqs.question: Is A2 Hosting's Turbo plan worth the extra cost?
faqs.answer: For e-commerce, membership sites, or any site where speed directly affects revenue, yes. In our testing, Turbo servers reduced page load times by 40-50% compared to standard shared hosting. For simple blogs or brochure sites, the standard plan is sufficient.

faqs.question: What developer features does A2 Hosting offer?
faqs.answer: A2 Hosting supports PHP (versions 5.6 through 8.2), Node.js, Python, Ruby, and Perl. All plans include SSH access, Git integration, WP-CLI, and phpMyAdmin. The environment is significantly more flexible than most shared hosts.

author.name: Sarah Mitchell
author.title: Senior Tech Reviewer
author.bio: Sarah has tested web hosting services for 7 years.
